title: convaix consolidation: extract conversation pipeline into convaix
description: Extract aishell's 3-provider import pipeline + pgvector into convaix; absorb llmconv; expose a master singleton facade (Convaix + get_convaix()); aishell sheds all conv code and mounts convaix's command group. Spec: docs/specs/2026-05-23-consolidation-design.md

title: convaix-core: absorb llmconv
description: Merge validate.py (structural + content-quality from llmconv), add clean_turn_text() to schema.py, move schema.json + examples/, add sentence-transformers fallback to embeddings.py. Resolve MLX embedding test crashes (catchable ImportError 'metallib not found' -> auto ST fallback). All existing convaix tests pass. NOTE: search.py backend-agnostic refactor MOVED to convaix-0yh.2 (depends on ConversationStore interface). Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-23-convaix-core.md
close_reason: convaix-core done on branch convaix-core (c842479); 62 tests pass, MLX crash resolved

title: backends: sqlite-vec + pgvector behind ConversationStore
description: 2a: ConversationStore interface (backends/base.py) + SQLite backend (backends/sqlite.py, refactored from db.py) + backend-agnostic search (search.py does merge/dedup; raw keyword/semantic/conversation queries move into the store) + schema.sql.template with dialect substitution. Migrate cli.py + test_db/test_search/test_cli to the class API (NO back-compat shims). Postgres deferred to 2b. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-25-convaix-backends-2a.md

title: master Convaix facade + get_convaix() singleton
description: Build Convaix class over store/embedder/search + module-level get_convaix() accessor (testable, not rigid GoF). Unit-test facade with SQLite backend.

title: providers: extract 3 converters from aishell
description: Move gemini.py (CDP), chatgpt.py (ZIP+API), claude_export.py (ZIP+API) + browser.py + manifest.py into convaix/providers/, separating extraction from Click. Wire as Convaix.import_* methods. Mock-browser schema-conversion tests.

title: convaix CLI command group
description: Build convaix/cli.py click group on the facade: import-gemini/chatgpt/claude, search, list, history, export, validate. This is the group aishell mounts.

title: aishell integration: delete conv code + mount convaix group
description: Add convaix dependency; aishell_cli.add_command(conv_group); delete aishell commands/{gemini,chatgpt,claude_export}.py and commands/conversations/. All aishell tests pass.

title: retire llmconv
description: Archive llmconv to github/_archive/ (personal data in conversations/ + raw/ preserved). schema.json/examples/clean_turn_text already absorbed.

title: MLX metallib not found in convaix env (embeddings fall back to ST)
description: Broken MLX/Metal in convaix env. In a fresh process, 'import mlx.core' raises a catchable ImportError ('Failed to load the default metallib'). BUT once torch has initialized Metal (e.g. after sentence-transformers loads), the same import escalates to an UNCATCHABLE C-level abort() (SIGABRT, exit 134) that crashed the full pytest suite. Mitigation shipped: embeddings auto-backend NEVER imports MLX; it defaults to sentence-transformers. MLX is opt-in via CONVAIX_EMBED_BACKEND=mlx. Real fix: repair the mlx Metal install so its metallib loads; consider a subprocess-based safe probe before re-enabling MLX in auto.
